rootCause: Playwright defaulted to chromium_headless_shell in headless mode, but the execution environment lacked libatk system libraries required by that binary. Grouped E2E runs failed before tests executed meaningful assertions.
resolution: Resolved Chromium launch configuration to always use the full Chromium executable path when available (env override first, then Playwright-detected executable), bypassing the headless-shell binary that requires unavailable system libs.
